Session.title: Session
Session.description: Split bill session with line items and participants.

hostId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the host.

hostEmail.description: Email address of the host user.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the split-bill session.

items.description: Array of item details extracted from the receipt.

participants.description: Array of split-bill participants and their progress.

taxAmount.description: Total tax amount from receipt in IDR

serviceCharge.description: Total service charge from receipt in IDR

subtotalItems.description: Subtotal of all line items in IDR before fees

grandTotal.description: Total final receipt payment amount in IDR

luckyDrawWinnerId.description: Participant assigned to bear the rounding amount

paymentInfo.description: Bank and QRIS details to process guests transfers

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: A split-bill session containing receipts, participants lists, and status flags.
